features: Fashion Design: French design hairpins, not only can decorate your hair, but also show elegant and sweet temperament, making you more charming and elegant. Suitable for any female hairstyle

High Quality: The durable metal spring supports it to open at an angle close to 180°, making it easy to create your own hairstyle and not easy to damage. The hairpin is made of high-quality plastic and metal spring, which is durable and flexible; easy to use and not easy to break
Hairpin Size: The flower claw size is up to 4 cm/1.6 inches, suitable for medium-thick hair. The hairpins are available in 4 different colors and 2 styles to meet your daily life and dating use

Double-row Teeth Styling: The unique double-row tooth design has a stronger grip and can fix the hair well without falling off.The toothed design of the claw clip can handle any thick or thin hair well, and can hold the hair tightly, which is very suitable for thick, sparse, curly or straight hair

Perfect Gift: Exquisite and cute flower design hairpins, fashionable hairpins for girls, women's hair accessories, share beauty together. Can be given to mothers, wives, girlfriends, sisters and daughters on birthdays, Christmas, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, New Year's Day and other occasions. It will be a very special gift
description: Features: Small claw clips in 4 colors and 2 styles 8 versatile packages in various colors and styles to enhance your fashion choices and highlight your elegance and charm in any occasion. Fashionable and versatile, highlight your personality Our women's hairpins are exquisitely designed and come in a variety of styles to perfectly match your unique fashion style. Whether you pursue simple elegance, retro classics or avant-garde trends, you can find a style that suits your style among our exquisite hairpins. Enhanced grip design. Double-row teeth shape. The unique double-row teeth design has a stronger grip and can fix the hair well without falling off.
